productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Gem Ring Black Clutch
description: A perfect option to go with your dresses, this black clutch from lino perros comes with a glossy upper and a spacious inner to hold your party essentials. Dimensions : 13 cm x 27 cm Made of textured fabric with a fabric lining A flap to hold the clutch together with magnetic button closure Crystal embellishment on the front of the flap One main compartment Detachable chain strap for ease of carrying One insert pocket Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
